Move Without Pain Again.

Expert physiotherapy in Westlands helping you recover from back pain, sports injuries, posture problems and more.

Call Now WhatsApp Now
Located in Westlands Home visits available Modern physiotherapy techniques Insurance accepted

Are you dealing with any of these?

  • Persistent back or neck pain
  • Shoulder or knee injuries
  • Sports injuries that won't heal
  • Stiffness from long hours at a desk
  • Pain that keeps coming back

You don't have to live with pain. With the right treatment, your body can heal and become stronger than before.

Our Services

Back & Neck Pain Treatment

Relieve pain, improve posture and restore spinal movement.

Sports Injury Rehabilitation

Recover safely from injuries and return to peak performance.

Posture & Workplace Therapy

Fix posture issues caused by sitting and screen time.

Dry Needling & Modern Therapy

Target tight muscles and speed up recovery.

Home Physiotherapy Visits

Receive treatment in the comfort of your home.

View all services

What you can expect

Reduced painImproved mobilityFaster recoveryBetter postureReturn to work or sport

Real stories, real transformations

These real stories illuminate the path to transformation, showcasing the impact of personalized care on physical well-being.

"I received best services. I had upper back pain for three years and I got well after receiving treatment from katasi physiotherapy. Thankyou so much"
J
Jane Muriithi
"great services with good customer care"
b
brian simiyu
"Very efficient and reliable services. I am so grateful that I am back on my feet and back too normal life. Thumbs up"
V
Vane Moraa

Meet Your Physiotherapist

Katasi Physiotherapy is led by a qualified physiotherapist trained at KMTC and Amref, focused on evidence-based rehabilitation and personalized care for every patient.

About us LinkedIn

The Katasi Physiotherapy Approach

We focus on more than pain relief — our personalized care restores movement, strength, and confidence, helping you get back to living fully.

Evidence-based care

Treatment plans are tailored to each patient's specific needs, considering their medical history, lifestyle, and goals. Every recommendation is grounded in the latest clinical research.

Holistic wellness approach

We look at the whole person — not just the injury. Our approach addresses posture, lifestyle, stress, and overall physical health for lasting results.

Patient empowerment

We educate and equip you with the knowledge and exercises to manage your health independently, so you feel confident long after treatment ends.

Unveiling Physiotherapy: Your Path to Optimal Health

Explore how physiotherapy offers a pathway to optimal health through diverse techniques, personalized approaches, and holistic well-being.
The transformative power of physiotherapy

Physiotherapy, a beacon of hope in healthcare, employs diverse techniques to address physical ailments, fostering recovery and overall well-being.
